project_description: Simple calculator mobile app with Clean Architecture

architecture.description: Follow Clean Architecture: presentation layer depends on domain, domain is independent, data implements domain interfaces
Use Riverpod for all state management, avoid StatefulWidget for business logic

naming_conventions.description: Files: lowercase_with_underscores.dart, Classes: PascalCase, variables/functions: camelCase
Providers end with 'Provider', StateNotifiers end with 'Notifier', widgets end with 'Widget' or 'Screen'

presentation_layer.description: Use ConsumerWidget for widgets that read providers, keep widgets small and focused on single responsibility
Extract reusable UI components into separate widget files, avoid business logic in widgets

data_layer.description: Use Repository pattern for data access, repositories implement interfaces defined in domain layer

testing.description: Write unit tests for business logic and use cases, mock dependencies with mocktail
Use widget tests for UI components, test user interactions and state changes
